title: Exact Finite Ideal And Quotient Ring Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite ideal additive-closure and quotient-ring QF_UF/Alethe seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: A malformed ideal closure row and a quotient-ring representative row both reduce to compact equality conflicts: additive closure must include 2+2, and quotient addition must be independent of representative choice.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional ideal or quotient rows only when they add distinct congruence pressure; keep correspondence theorems, localization, and prime/maximal ideal theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite ideal and quotient-ring tables as deterministic finite-function and equality obligations.
Replay ideal membership, principal-ideal generation, ring-homomorphism kernel/image, and quotient-ring witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route quotient representative congruence through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence so quotient operations do not silently trust representative choice.
Route bad finite ideal additive-closure conflicts through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence once exact evaluation replay identifies the failing sum.
Keep general ideal theory, quotient-ring theorems, correspondence theorems, localization, prime/maximal ideals, and algebraic geometry under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
